_comment: Daily trigger for the skill. This lives in OpenClaw's cron, NOT in SKILL.md. Append the object below to ~/.openclaw/cron/jobs.json -> jobs[]. Shipped DISABLED (enabled:false). 'to' / channel is a PLACEHOLDER — install.sh substitutes DFO_DISCORD_CHANNEL (or set it by hand). Schedule mirrors user_preferences.yaml order_time 12:30 America/Los_Angeles.
name: daily-food-ordering

payload.message: Run the daily-food-ordering skill exactly as specified in skills/daily-food-ordering/SKILL.md. Run the deterministic engine (cd into the skill dir, then `python3 run.py --provider doordash --claim-slot --config user_preferences.yaml`). Do NOT recompute the budget/safety decision yourself, and do NOT fall back to `--provider mock` — the mock never contacts a restaurant and would report a fake success. If the engine returns provider_unavailable (DoorDash bot wall / not logged in), SKIP today and notify the user to re-run `--login`; place nothing. The DoorDash adapter stops before payment — never complete a charge. Resolve the AUTO/CONFIRM/BLOCK verdict per the SKILL, and post one severity-calibrated summary to Discord channel <your-discord-channel-id> via the message tool.

description: Daily meal order at 12:30 PT. DISABLED by default — enable only after a one-time DoorDash --login. Stops before payment; never charges.
